Clumsy Inspector Jacques Clouseau (Peter Sellers) chases a jewel thief (David Niven) and his nephew (Robert Wagner).
programme.title: The Pink Panther

programme.desc: Blondie (Penny Singleton) fills in for Dagwood (Arthur Lake) at the office, so he can go on a fishing trip.
programme.title: Blondie Meets the Boss

programme.desc: Two guys (Chuck Norris, Louis Gossett Jr.) and a girl (Melody Anderson) brave jungle hazards to find an Aztec temple filled with gold.
programme.title: Firewalker

programme.desc: An ace reporter's editor, her ex-husband, tries everything possible to stop her from remarrying someone else.
programme.title: His Girl Friday

programme.desc: While on a business trip, an ambitious, young lawyer immediately falls in love with a stranger. They wed the following day, and tragedy soon strikes.
programme.title: Made for Each Other

programme.desc: An Indian teenager (Johnny Crawford) forms a bond with a horse, who saves his life.
programme.title: Indian Paint

programme.desc: A U.S. agent (Richard Greene), a nightclub singer (Anouk Aimée) and a British customs officer (Michael Denison) chase smugglers and counterfeiters to France.
programme.title: Contraband Spain

programme.desc: During the Civil War, reports of a sea monster attacking ships alarm the Navy. An investigation finds the monster is a submarine, the "Nautilus," commanded by vengeance-seeking Capt. Nemo (Allen Holubar), who was once an Indian prince.
programme.title: 20,000 Leagues Under the Sea

programme.desc: A circus performer falls for an heir in the 1840s New Orleans during Mardi Gras.
programme.title: Dixiana

programme.desc: Robbo (Frank Sinatra), Little John (Dean Martin), Will (Sammy Davis Jr.) and company are charitable gangsters fighting for turf in 1928 Chicago.
programme.title: Robin and the Seven Hoods

programme.desc: Two shipwrecked stowaways (Bing Crosby, Bob Hope) ride a camel and meet a princess (Dorothy Lamour), whom they rescue from a desert chief.
programme.title: Road to Morocco

programme.desc: Mark Twain's boy hero (Eddie Hodges) rafts the Mississippi with slave Jim (Archie Moore) and meets a bogus king (Tony Randall) and duke.
programme.title: The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn

programme.desc: Goofy professor Kelp's potion turns him into Buddy Love, a lounge singer at ease with a coed and a crowd.

programme.desc: An avenger's (Richard Harrison) quest in the name of his father leads from Mexico to a duel in Texas.
programme.title: Gunfight at Red Sands

programme.desc: A doctor (John Forsythe) sets an expiration date with a rich patient's (Richard Kiley) wife (Reta Shaw).
programme.title: Murder Once Removed

programme.desc: The mythical Greek hero (Reg Park) rescues a maiden left at the mercy of a beast and goes on to save his son from the sexist queen of lost Atlantis (Fay Spain).
programme.title: Hercules and the Captive Women

programme.desc: A man (Mark Damon) seeks revenge after the murder of a relative who left him money.
programme.title: Johnny Yuma

programme.desc: A folksy New England poet (Gary Cooper) inherits $20 million he doesn't want and tells a New York newswoman (Jean Arthur) why.
programme.title: Mr. Deeds Goes to Town

programme.desc: A hit man (Frank Sinatra) and company plan to shoot the president when he gets off his train in Suddenly, Calif.
programme.title: Suddenly

programme.title: Good Morning LIVE
programme.desc: Good Morning LIVE is an engaging 30-minute program designed to inspire, inform, and connect viewers to the heart of meaningful living. Hosted by James Epperly, this dynamic show brings together a unique blend of inspirational devotions, thought-provoking interviews, and discussions on current events that matter most to you. Each episode offers uplifting messages to start your day on a positive note, insightful conversations with special guests, and a closer look at how current events align with faith and personal growth. programme.title: Gospel Truth with Andrew Wommack
programme.desc: Thirty-two years ago a man had an encounter with God that changed his life forever. Today, he shares that experience with thousands of people all over the world. The goal of Andrew Wommack is to reach as many people as possible with the love of God and message of grace and faith. He doesn’t measure the success of the ministry by the number of tapes distributed, books sold or offerings received. The real rewards, and proof that God is alive and working in people’s lives, are the many testimonies he receives from the people impacted by his teachings. To find out more, please visit our website at: http://www.awmi.net http://www.awmi.net/ www.awmi.net

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: Rick Renner is widely known for his interpretation of the Greek New Testament and his engaging teaching style. His teaching is punctuated by a unique ability to draw vividly descriptive word pictures from the Greek that illuminate the Scriptures in a fresh, new way. Rick also distinctively shares Bible principles through contemporary illustrations set against an extensive cultural and historical backdrop of New Testament times. In each episode of “Rick Renner,” Rick teaches in-depth on a passage of Scripture verse by verse, centered around a specific theme that is vitally relevant to the lives of believers who are hungry to dig deeper into the treasures of God’s Word. For more information, visit http://www.renner.org.

programme.title: The Elena & Natalia Show
programme.desc: We're twins, Elena & Natalia Maranian, and are passionate about sharing the love of Jesus through media. We are also honored to serve at our family's TV network and media ministry, International Christian Family Network, Inc. where we hosted our former talk show, New Generation.

programme.desc: Former Hollywood actress, pop culture expert, Tina Griffin, left her Wisconsin dairy farm at the age of 20 and headed to Hollywood, CA to earn a BA in Film and Television broadcasting from California State University - Los Angeles. She has opened for bands such as Colton Dixon, Third Day, and Jeremy Camp. programme.desc: Dr. Rodney Howard-Browne is the founder and pastor of Revival Ministries International in Tampa, Florida. Rodney and his wife Adonica pastor a church in Tampa, Florida, The River at Tampa Bay, which they founded in 1996 and which now has 3000 members. These three things have remained constant since the church’s inception…dynamic praise and worship, anointed preaching and teaching of the Word, and powerful demonstrations of the Holy Spirit and power.
